evals.name: memory-leak-detection
evals.prompt: Review this Android Kotlin code for memory leaks and other critical issues
evals.expected_output: Should detect the static Activity reference as a CRITICAL memory leak, Handler leak as CRITICAL, and provide specific recommendations with code examples showing ❌ wrong vs ✅ correct patterns.

evals.name: thread-safety-fragment
evals.prompt: Review this Fragment code for thread safety issues and lifecycle problems
evals.expected_output: Should detect UI update from background thread (CRITICAL), missing coroutine cancellation (HIGH), and recommend using lifecycleScope with proper Main thread switching.

evals.name: security-hardcoded-secrets
evals.prompt: Review this Android code for security vulnerabilities and hardcoded secrets
evals.expected_output: Should detect hardcoded API key (CRITICAL), logging sensitive data like passwords (CRITICAL), API key in URL (CRITICAL), and excessive HTTP logging (HIGH). All with specific remediation steps.
